description_long: This is a wooden baseball bat with a dark brown finish, featuring a cylindrical barrel that tapers smoothly into a rounded handle. The barrel is wrapped with several layers of black barbed wire, giving it a rugged and menacing appearance. The handle is slightly thicker at the knob, providing a secure grip for the user. The wood grain is visible along the length of the bat, adding to its realistic texture. There are no visible brand logos, grip tape, or decorative markings on the bat. The overall look suggests it could be used as both a sports implement and an improvised weapon in an urban environment.
description: A dark brown wooden baseball bat wrapped with black barbed wire around the barrel, featuring a visible wood grain and a rounded handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the bat and the barbed wire wrapped around the barrel.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the circular end of the barrel and the dense wrapping of barbed wire.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the length and barbed wire details, with the handle and knob visible.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the rounded knob of the handle and the end of the bat, with the barbed wire visible at the far end.
